context: Tests whether the agent composes AppleScript directly with osascript -e for operations not covered by the helper scripts, uses locale-safe relative date arithmetic, avoids the reserved 'result' variable name, uses _private_experimental_ json for output, and guards against empty list errors.

checklist.name: Uses osascript directly
checklist.description: Script invokes osascript -e (or osascript with a heredoc/file) to execute AppleScript, rather than relying solely on things-create.sh or things-query.sh for the deadline/checklist operations

checklist.name: Relative date arithmetic
checklist.description: AppleScript sets due dates using relative arithmetic like '(current date) + N * days' rather than absolute date strings

checklist.name: No absolute date literals
checklist.description: Does NOT use the pattern date "YYYY-MM-DD" or similar locale-dependent date literals when setting due dates on tasks

checklist.name: Avoids 'result' variable
checklist.description: AppleScript code does NOT use 'result' as a variable name for string accumulation; uses 'output' or another name instead

checklist.name: Uses _private_experimental_ json
checklist.description: AppleScript uses the '_private_experimental_ json' property to retrieve structured data from task or project objects

checklist.name: Empty list guard
checklist.description: AppleScript checks the count of query results before accessing items (e.g., 'if (count of todoList) > 0') or uses 'every to do' to safely handle potentially empty lists

checklist.name: Name lookup with count check
checklist.description: AppleScript uses 'every to do whose name is/contains' with a subsequent count check, rather than 'first to do whose name is' without a guard, when finding tasks by name

checklist.name: Checklist items in script
checklist.description: Script includes AppleScript for adding checklist items (using 'make new to do' within a task/project context, or setting checklist items property) — an operation not available in the helper scripts

checklist.name: Three distinct deadlines
checklist.description: Script sets different relative deadlines (e.g., +5 days, +10 days, +14 days) for at least three different tasks

checklist.name: Markdown deadline report
checklist.description: The deadline_report.md presents the tasks and their deadlines as a markdown table or list (not raw JSON)
